products.title: CM 7 Laptop Case Black

products.title: CM 9 Cardcase Natural
products.description: With CM 9, Christian Metzner has designed a very compact credit card case. The special feature is that it has five compartments that are not connected to each other, which makes it easier to use. It has space for 5 to 9 cards and a main compartment in the middle for banknotes. In use, the leather acquires a very beautiful individual patina. Four slash pockets and one large compartment in-between.

Its lightness, structure, and remarkable durability immediately caught my attention. Weighing just 35 grams, it can carry up to eight kilograms. products.title: CA 6 Backpack Black
products.description: Designer Christine Ahrens has designed perhaps the lightest leather backpack in the world. We don't know for sure, but CA 6 weighs only 700 grams and is extremely durable. The vegetable-tanned leather from Belgium is of such good quality that it can be thinned from its initial thickness of 2.5 mm to 0.9 mm, thus reducing its weight but retaining its stability. products.title: AB 103.1 Bucket Bag Natural
products.description: In 2014, we presented our first Bucket Bag. Since then we love this bag, its oval, infinite shape, the way it hugs the body in different ways and its lightness. So there are many reasons to keep thinking about the typology of this bag. products.title: Gift Card
products.description: Shopping for someone else but not sure what to give them? Give them the gift of choice with a PB 0110 gift card. Gift cards are delivered by email and contain instructions to redeem them at checkout. Our gift cards have no additional processing fees.

products.title: AB 127 Keyring Black
products.description: In 2017, I asked the Munich artist Martin Fengel to design fruit and vegetables for a pop-up shop in the renowned department store Le Bonne Marche in Paris so that we could emboss them onto accessories on site. products.title: CM 52 Wallet Dark Olive
products.description: One inspiration for the ensemble of products that can be worn very close to the body is certainly the realisation that the mobile phone is moving ever closer to us in many respects. products.title: PB 9 Mousepad Olive
products.description: My mouse pad is an essential tool for me. I love how the mouse glides smoothly over the leather, and how the marks of use become visible over time. We intentionally made it smaller than many conventional models so that it doesn’t dominate the workspace, yet still functions perfectly. The suede leather on the back ensures it stays firmly in place and doesn’t slip. Yours, Philipp Bree Handmade in Po

products.title: PB 6 Address Tag Natural
products.description: Luggage tags hold a special magic for me, as they symbolize a connection to home. Over the years, I’ve seen countless designs and developed many, but until now, we hadn’t included one in our collection. products.title: PB 5 Airpod Case Regatta
products.description: In-ear headphones are an essential companion in everyday life. For this important accessory, we wanted to create a special storage solution – inspired by a pillow. The headphones should be softly, securely, and safely cushioned. products.title: PB 4 Keyring Black
products.description: The keychain with its ring is a product I’ve been using daily for over 10 years. The leather circle with its distinctive opening is not only eye-catching but also incredibly practical: it’s easy to pull out of bags, retrieve from a tangle of keys, or simply hold in your hand for a soothing moment of play. products.title: PB 3 Passport Case Natural
products.description: A simple sleeve for your passport, receipts, tickets, and more. It is versatile, takes up minimal space, and fits effortlessly into any bag. The passport can be quickly and easily removed during electronic passport control without needing to detach the back cover. products.title: PB 2 Card Case Black
products.description: This cardholder offers space for at least five credit cards and folded bills. Thanks to its well-thought-out proportions and rounded opening, the cards can be easily accessed, making handling significantly easier. A separate inner compartment ensures that bills are neatly stored and don’t mix with the cards. It feels very comfortable in the hand and fits compactly in your pocket." Handmade in Pola

products.title: PL 1 Bag Hook Orange (FOUND)
products.description: The functionality of a bag hanger is remarkable. Soft bags that don't stand upright find their place. In Japan, avoiding placing bags on the floor is customary, which might be why I found what I consider the most aesthetically pleasing and functional bag hangers at Lihit Lab in Japan. products.title: AB 115.1 Messenger Bag Natural
products.description: In September 2009, archaeologists discovered tiny linen fibers in a cave in Georgia that date back to 36,000 years before Christ. These fibers bear traces of twine and pigment and are considered the earliest known textiles developed by humans. A remarkable material to this day. products.title: AB 125 Pouch Light Tan
products.description: AB 125 is a pouch made of natural, soft Italian linen and vegetable-tanned leather. It is worked flat so that the linen conforms to the contents. The inside of the linen is coated and can be easily cleaned or the pouch can be washed completely in the care wash program. products.title: Hinza Bag Shopper (FOUND)
products.description: The Hinza is a Swedish classic from 1957, a bag that Philipp Bree came across with great interest. products.title: AB 122 Pouch Light Olive
products.description: AB 122 is a pouch made of extremely soft, thin, durable cowhide. Its softness protects and accommodates a wide variety of items, it nestles inside the bag and has a special feeling when you hold it in your hand. products.title: DK 3 Paperweight Stone (FOUND)
products.description: ONLY 1 AVAILABLE I love stones. They have unique structures, shapes and are sometimes millions of years old. Marked by time, each one is unique. products.title: CM 9 Cardcase Brown
products.description: With CM 9, Christian Metzner has designed a very compact credit card case. The special feature is that it has five compartments that are not connected to each other, which makes it easier to use. It has space for 5 to 9 cards and a main compartment in the middle for banknotes. In use, the leather acquires a very beautiful individual patina. Four slash pockets and one large compartment in-between.
